sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9698" key="a)ntepistaltiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεπι-σταλτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n9698.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for replying to a letter</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-κή</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">art of writing replies,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2200.tlg008:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epist.Charact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
